commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: This active feature PR has no source-proven blocking defect in this review, but the dirty branch state and Discord voice-follow policy/availability tradeoff need maintainer or author action before merge.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression was found; the diff is Discord voice config/runtime/docs/tests/generated metadata with no new dependencies or workflow changes. (sha=19fba1f641f9ccf8a09e18b9ee25f1bef53ea57c)
commands.review_summary:
Adds opt-in Discord `voice.followUsers` configuration, follow/reconcile logic, docs/generated metadata, changelog, and e2e coverage for join, move, leave, handoff, and DAVE recovery ownership.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR adds a new opt-in Discord voice-follow feature. The changed behavior is source-reviewable and has submitted video proof plus e2e coverage, but I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This active feature PR has no source-proven blocking defect in this review, but the dirty branch state and Discord voice-follow policy/availability tradeoff need maintainer or author action before merge.

target.title: feat(discord): follow configured users in voice
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds Discord voice follow-users docs with behavior rules for allowed channels, multi-user handoff, bounded reconciliation, admin moves, and DAVE recovery.
- Preserves follow ownership through DAVE receive recovery and failed handoff cleanup.
- Reworks follow-user reconciliation so large user/guild sets page within a bounded REST lookup budget instead of skipping or starving stale bot cleanup.
- Adds regression coverage for handoff, bounded paging, guild/bot-check rotation, and DAVE recovery ownership.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Discord voice sessions can follow configured users reliably, including large follow lists, multi-user handoff, allowed-channel enforcement, and DAVE recovery.
Real environment tested: Mac Studio source checkout running the PR head with the Discord gateway provider enabled.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: configured ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json with channels.discord.voice.enabled=true, followUsersEnabled=true, and followUsers=["387380367612706819"].
Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm openclaw config validate
Exact steps or command run after this patch: restarted openclaw-gateway-watch-main with pnpm gateway:watch --benchmark from the PR checkout.
Evidence after fix: config validation printed Config valid: ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json.
Evidence after fix: runtime proof printed branch=pr-84264-discord-voice-follow, head=19fba1f641, voice.enabled=true, voice.mode=agent-proxy, voice.followUsersEnabled=true, and voice.followUsers=["387380367612706819"].
Evidence after fix: gateway startup logs on Mac Studio showed OpenClaw 2026.5.19 (19fba1f), [gateway] ready, and the Discord provider starting successfully.
Observed result after fix: Mac Studio is now configured to follow Discord user 387380367612706819 in voice, and the gateway is running the PR code that owns follow handoff, reconciliation, and DAVE recovery behavior.
What was not tested: speaking in a live Discord voice channel; the proof covers real config load, gateway startup, and provider initialization, with behavior covered by focused tests below.

## Verification
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-discord.config.ts extensions/discord/src/config-schema.test.ts
Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm config:channels:check
Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm config:docs:check
Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm config:schema:check
Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/channels/discord.md extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.ts extensions/discord/src/voice/manager.e2e.test.ts CHANGELOG.md
Exact steps or command run after this patch: git diff --check
Exact steps or command run after this patch: pnpm build
Exact steps or command run after this patch: codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox --sandbox danger-full-access review --uncommitted
Evidence after fix: Discord voice manager e2e suite passed 82/82; Discord config schema test passed 33/33; config generation checks, formatting, diff-check, build, and autoreview passed.
